title: helenium polygonatum
intro: Helenium polygonatum, also known as Sneezeweed, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and distinctive drooping petals. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to induce sweating and relieve colds and fever, due to its content of volatile oils and iridoid glycosides. The health benefits of Helenium polygonatum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce congestion and soothe respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Sneezeweed can be made by infusing the dried flowers in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant's roots to create a tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
